title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 06 2024

section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 06 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/03/2024
DCE iron ore futures fall today，the main contract I2405 closed 881.5. part of the business quotationshipping mentality turn weak；Inquiries from steel mills have decreased, resulting in poor purchasing enthusiasm. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
